```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'), include = c('log2_age_2'))

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c('aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'),
                 include = c('log2_age_2'))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'),
                   include = c('log2_age_2'))

### model without birth weight
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1
```

### aCREA

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

## data selection

ni= 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(aAGE) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome) 
column_name <- paste0('log2_', column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit()

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter = TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aCREA_boot', reuse = TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_29 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 29. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(creatinine) level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_29
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'))

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c('aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'))

### model without birth weight
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}

## AIC

AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1
```

### aUA

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

## data selection

ni= 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit()

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter = TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aUA_boot', reuse = TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_30 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 30. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of uric acid level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_30
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'))

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c('aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'))

### model without birth weight
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1
```

### aVIT_AKTB12

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

ni= 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name),
         log2_age_2 = log2_age**2) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome),
         !is.na(aSup_B12)) 


```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSup_B12 +
    s(log2_age_2) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSup_B12 +
    s(log2_age_2) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome) 
column_name <- paste0('log2_', column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'),
                    include = c('aSup_B12', 'log2_age_2'))

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter=TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aVIT_AKTB12_boot', reuse = TRUE)


## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_31 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 31. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(vitamin B12) serum level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_31

```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX', 'log2_age'), 
                  include = c('aSup_B12', 'log2_age_2'))

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c(
                             'aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration','log2_age'),  
                 include = c('aSup_B12', 'log2_age_2'))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP','log2_age'),
                   include = c('aSup_B12', 'log2_age_2'))

### model without supplementation
mod_other_cov <- rqfit(exclude=c('log2_age'), include=c('log2_age_2'))

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'), include = 'aSup_B12')

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1 
```

### aHCY

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

## data selection

ni= 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSup_B12 +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome)
column_name <- paste0('log2_', column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit()

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter = TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aHCY_boot', reuse = TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_32 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 32. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(homocysteine) level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_32
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'))

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c('aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'))

### model without birth weight
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1
```

### aMMA

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

## data selection

ni= 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSup_B12 +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. Even though it's not perfect we will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome) 
column_name <- paste0('log2_', column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit()

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter=TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aMMA_boot', reuse = TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_33 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 33. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(methylmalonic acid) level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_33
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'))

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c('aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'))

### model without birth weight
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1
```

### aVIT_D

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

ni= 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome),
         !is.na(aSUP_D)) 


```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSUP_D +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSUP_D +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome) 
column_name <- paste0('log2_', column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(exclude = c(),
                    include = c('aSUP_D'))

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter = TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aVIT_D_boot', reuse = TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_34 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 34. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(vitamin D) serum level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_34
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'), include = 'aSUP_D')

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c(
                             'aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'),  
                 include = 'aSUP_D')

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'),include = 'aSUP_D')

### model without supplementation
mod_other_cov <- rqfit()

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'), include = 'aSUP_D')

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1 
```

### aFOLAT

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

ni = 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name 

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome),
         !is.na(aSUP_FOL))


```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSUP_FOL +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit(exclude = c(),
                    include = c('aSUP_FOL'))

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter = TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aFOLAT_boot', reuse = TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_35 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 35. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of folate serum level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_35
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'), include = 'aSUP_FOL')

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c(
                             'aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'),  
                 include = 'aSUP_FOL')

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'),include = 'aSUP_FOL')

### model without supplementation
mod_other_cov <- rqfit()

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'), include = 'aSUP_FOL')

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1 
```

### aIGF1

Data selection

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=7}

## data selection

ni= 10

column_name <- names(dat_child_all)[i+ni]
column_name

dat_mod <- dat_child_all %>%
  mutate(outcome = !!sym(column_name)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(outcome))
```

GAMM

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  outcome ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Again with log2-transformed outcome

```{r, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

gamm <- gam(
  log2(outcome) ~ 
    aBreastFeed_full_stopped +
    aBreastFeed_full_duration +
    aBreastFeed_total_stopped + 
    SEX + 
    GRP +
    aSup_B12 +
    s(log2_age) +
    s(FAM, bs='re'), 
  data = dat_mod)

summary(gamm)
anova(gamm)
plot(gamm, select = 1)

### Model check
pltmd(gamm)
```

Log-transformation improved the fit. We will continue to work with log-transformed values.

Quantile model

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

dat_mod$outcome <- log2(dat_mod$outcome) 
column_name <- paste0('log2_', column_name)

## main model 
mod_main <- rqfit()

## bootstrapping of main model
mod_boot <- run(
  clust_boot(mod_main, seed= 16, R = nsim, jitter = TRUE),
  path = 'gitignore/run/mod_child_all_aIGF1_boot', reuse = TRUE)

## extract sampled coefficients and create resulting table
res_tab_q20 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 1)
res_tab_q50 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 2)
res_tab_q80 <- exte(mod_boot, nquantile = 3)

## combining the results into a single table
res <- cbind(res_tab_q20,res_tab_q50, res_tab_q80)
  
suppl_table_36 <- kbl(res, caption = 
      'Suppl. Table 36. Results of quantile regression, modelling (A) 20th quantile, (B) median and (C) 80th quantile of log2(growth factor) level. CI_L and CI_U are bounds of 95% confidence interval. Estimates are based on bootstrap (21000 simulations)') %>% 
  kable_styling('striped',full_width = T) %>% 
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 1, '(A) 20th quantile' = 4, 
                     '(B) Median' = 4, '(C) 80th quantile' = 4)) %>% 
  column_spec(1, width_min = '1.5in')


suppl_table_36
```

Leave-one-factor lqm

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=6, warning=FALSE}

### model without sex
mod_nsex <- rqfit(exclude = c('SEX'))

### model without breastfeeding-related predictors
mod_nbf <- rqfit(exclude = c('aBreastFeed_full_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_total_stopped',
                             'aBreastFeed_full_duration'))

### model without diet groups
mod_ndiet <- rqfit(exclude = c('GRP'))

### model without birth weight
mod_other_cov <- NA

### model without log2_age
mod_log2_age <- rqfit(exclude = c('log2_age'))

```

Putting key results together

```{r}
AIC_child_all <- add_AIC(AIC_child_all)

diet_child_all <- add_eff(diet_child_all, res)

i = i+1
```


### Save tables

```{r}

## Between-diets differences

if(file.exists('gitignore/data/diet_child_all.xlsx') == FALSE){
  diet_child_all <- diet_child_all[-1,]
  
  diet_child_all$VN_OM_P_adj <- NA
  diet_child_all$VG_OM_P_adj <- NA
  diet_child_all$VN_VG_P_adj <- NA
  
for (i in seq(1, nrow(diet_child_all), by = 3)) {
  padj <- p.adjust(c(
    diet_child_all$VN_OM_P[i], 
    diet_child_all$VN_OM_P[i+1],
    diet_child_all$VN_OM_P[i+2],
    
    diet_child_all$VG_OM_P[i],
    diet_child_all$VG_OM_P[i+1],
    diet_child_all$VG_OM_P[i+2],
    
    diet_child_all$VN_VG_P[i],
    diet_child_all$VN_VG_P[i+1],
    diet_child_all$VN_VG_P[i+2]), method = 'hochberg')
  
  diet_child_all$VN_OM_P_adj[i:(i+2)] <- padj[1:3]
  diet_child_all$VG_OM_P_adj[i:(i+2)] <- padj[4:6]
  diet_child_all$VN_VG_P_adj[i:(i+2)] <- padj[7:9]
}
  
  
  diet_child_all <- diet_child_all %>%
    
    select(outcome, estimand, 
         VN_OM_diff, VN_OM_P, VN_OM_P_adj,
         VG_OM_diff, VG_OM_P, VG_OM_P_adj,
         VN_VG_diff, VN_VG_P, VN_VG_P_adj) %>%
    
    mutate(across(.cols = 3:11, .fns = ~as.numeric(as.character(.)))) %>% 
    mutate(across(.cols = c(VN_OM_P, VG_OM_P, VN_VG_P,
                            VN_OM_P_adj, VG_OM_P_adj, VN_VG_P_adj), ~ round(.x, 5)))

  write.xlsx(diet_child_all, 'gitignore/data/diet_child_all.xlsx')
}

## Importance of predictors

if(file.exists('gitignore/data/AIC_child_all.xlsx') == FALSE){
  AIC_child_all <- AIC_child_all[-1,]
  write.xlsx(AIC_child_all, 'gitignore/data/AIC_child_all.xlsx')
  }

```



# Reproducibility

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
